title: Custom Vanilla Trees from Saplings
description: Lets you grow sapling into a Custom Tree
body:
**Want to have nice Custom Trees instead of the boring Vanilla ones?**
##
Here you go. (now more vanilla friendly)

This is a Variant of my [Custom Trees from Saplings](https://modrinth.com/datapack/custom-trees-from-saplings) pack.
## 
With this Datapack every sapling that grows will grown into a Custom Tree (multiple variants and rotation per Type).
Just grow the sapling as you normally would (will also work with natural random tick growth)


Single Saplings and 2x2 supported.
Beehives will also generate like they do with vanilla trees if there are flowers nearby (and a viable biome).

If you plan on using this pack in a Survival World, I highly recommend
trying it out in another World first, because these Trees will override Blocks that are in their way!

Your are able to craft 4 Logs from 3 Wood, since most trees are made of Wood, not Logs.

If you want to change the default growth of saplings back to vanilla trees klick the corresponding option in chat after running:
/function custrees_modest:config/ (custom / vanilla)

## 

If you place a Sapling and see bonemeal at its root it has been converted to a
Custom Sapling.

![planted sapling](https://i.imgur.com/LzRvST3.png)


To grow Vanilla Trees, sneak while placing it (this can be reversed with the config)
If you want to remove this pack, make sure to remove all placed custom saplings before disabling the datapack! If you don't, you might end up with item_displays stuck in your world!

## 

Cherry trees have not been overhauled for this pack, since they fit pretty well with the custom trees already

The Trees used in this Pack are from [this Map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/tree-bundle-370-custom-trees-download/) and have been modified by me!
The Mushrooms and Nether Trees are built by me.

The Custom Trees have a special property that Dark Oak had when it was released =)

Like and Favourite this shit, become a botanist today!
